name: AVL Tree (Self-Balancing BST)
description: Insert keys into an AVL tree, maintaining height-balance by rotating subtrees.
intuition: After each BST insert, walk back up the path. At any node where |height(left) - height(right)| > 1, perform a rotation (LL/RR/LR/RL) to restore balance. This keeps the tree height ≤ 1.44 log₂ n.
